---
title: 'YouTube Reaction'
date: '2014-02-23T13:10:00.0020000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: '(My Journal) Fed By Faith'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '3006425875346642115'
blogger_filename: '/2014/02/youtube-reaction.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/(My Journal) Fed By Faith/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Feelings'
---

<br />
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=SirbABWOWfg<br />
<br />
<span style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 18.200000762939453px;">I have no official opinions on this video.&nbsp;</span><span style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 18.200000762939453px;">I haven't watched it all the way through yet. I want to comment on the comments I'm seeing below.&nbsp;</span><br style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 18.200000762939453px;" /><br style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 18.200000762939453px;" /><span style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 18.200000762939453px;">I also don't like the way this video was presented on other sites. I'm very weary of sites that post video's that I cannot pause or fast forward and then push sleezy "Are you sure you want to leave this page" pop up boxes.&nbsp;</span><br style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 18.200000762939453px;" /><br style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 18.200000762939453px;" /><span style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 18.200000762939453px;">I will suspend judgment on this video until I can take the time to watch it and study it out for myself.&nbsp;</span><br style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 18.200000762939453px;" /><br style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 18.200000762939453px;" /><span style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 18.200000762939453px;">However... I was so saddened by many of the comments I saw below pretending to be followers of Jesus. The biggest reason I was saddened is because if this was 2001 or before, I would have said those same things. How childish I used to be.&nbsp;</span><br style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 18.200000762939453px;" /><br style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 18.200000762939453px;" /><span style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 18.200000762939453px;">It's so sad to see people spout their venom about wealth and pretend they do it for Jesus. You can tell in the wording of their comments that it hasn't been spoken in Love but some odd venomous hate.</span><br style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 18.200000762939453px;" /><br style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 18.200000762939453px;" /><span style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 18.200000762939453px;">I'd like to pose the following for anyone who is either&nbsp;</span><br style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 18.200000762939453px;" /><br style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 18.200000762939453px;" /><span style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 18.200000762939453px;">A. Agreeing with these people who hate wealth as some how anti-biblical.&nbsp;</span><br style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 18.200000762939453px;" /><br style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 18.200000762939453px;" /><span style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 18.200000762939453px;">OR</span><br style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 18.200000762939453px;" /><br style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 18.200000762939453px;" /><span style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 18.200000762939453px;">B. Turned off by them.&nbsp;</span><br style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 18.200000762939453px;" /><br style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 18.200000762939453px;" /><span style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 18.200000762939453px;">If you hate wealth so much:</span><br style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 18.200000762939453px;" /><br style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 18.200000762939453px;" /><span style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 18.200000762939453px;">1. Explain&nbsp;</span><br style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 18.200000762939453px;" /><br style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 18.200000762939453px;" /><span style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 18.200000762939453px;">Deuteronomy 8:18</span><br />
<div style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 18.200000762939453px;">
New International Version (NIV)</div>
<div style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 18.200000762939453px;">
18 But remember the Lord your God, for it is he who gives you the ability to produce wealth, and so confirms his covenant, which he swore to your ancestors, as it is today.</div>
<br style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 18.200000762939453px;" /><span style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 18.200000762939453px;">2. If you have a house, car, cell phone, clothes, or food...&nbsp;</span><br style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 18.200000762939453px;" /><br style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 18.200000762939453px;" /><span style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 18.200000762939453px;">And you hate wealth...&nbsp;</span><br style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 18.200000762939453px;" /><br style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 18.200000762939453px;" /><span style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 18.200000762939453px;">Explain where the bible makes a clear distinction between "Need" and "Want". Who defines that?&nbsp;</span><br style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 18.200000762939453px;" /><br style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 18.200000762939453px;" /><span style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 18.200000762939453px;">In fact, if you have access to the Internet to make a comment on a YouTube Video you are among the wealthiest people in the world.&nbsp;</span><br style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 18.200000762939453px;" /><br style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 18.200000762939453px;" /><span style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 18.200000762939453px;">According to, http://www.globalissues.org/article/26/poverty-facts-and-stats:</span><br style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 18.200000762939453px;" /><br style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 18.200000762939453px;" /><span style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 18.200000762939453px;">"At least 80% of humanity lives on less than $10 a day."</span><br style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 18.200000762939453px;" /><br style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 18.200000762939453px;" /><span style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 18.200000762939453px;">So if you earn more than $10 US Dollars a day, you are in the top 20% of the world's wealthiest people.&nbsp;</span><br style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 18.200000762939453px;" /><br style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 18.200000762939453px;" /><span style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 18.200000762939453px;">So you comment on the Internet which means you make more than $10/Day and therefore are in the top 20% of the worlds wealthiest... I think Jesus had a word for that...&nbsp;</span><br style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 18.200000762939453px;" /><br style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 18.200000762939453px;" /><span style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 18.200000762939453px;">3. You are half right.&nbsp;</span><span style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 18.200000762939453px;">Bad Wealth Is Bad. Loving Money Is Bad.&nbsp;</span><br style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 18.200000762939453px;" /><br style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 18.200000762939453px;" /><span style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 18.200000762939453px;">Matthew 6 clearly shows us that people who gather money on this planet, for no other reason that to gather money on this planet are wasting their effort. TRUE wealth is built in God's kingdom. Since God's streets are paved with gold TRUE wealth won't be measured in money. It will be measured in the lives you touched with the LOVE of God.</span><br style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 18.200000762939453px;" /><br style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 18.200000762939453px;" /><span style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 18.200000762939453px;">If you LOVE money (1 Tim 6:10) you are headed for pain.&nbsp;</span><br style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 18.200000762939453px;" /><br style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 18.200000762939453px;" /><span style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 18.200000762939453px;">However...&nbsp;</span><br style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 18.200000762939453px;" /><br style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 18.200000762939453px;" /><span style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 18.200000762939453px;">Poor People are JUST as guilty of loving money as rich people are, maybe more so. Jesus defined this love of money for us another way in Matthew 6 and 7. Worrying about money is sin.&nbsp;</span><br style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 18.200000762939453px;" /><br style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 18.200000762939453px;" /><span style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 18.200000762939453px;">So if you have EVER worried about not being able to pay a bill you are guilty of the Love of Money.&nbsp;</span><br style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 18.200000762939453px;" /><br style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 18.200000762939453px;" /><span style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 18.200000762939453px;">He said in Matthew 6:24-25 that if you worry about what you will eat or wear you had made money your master.&nbsp;</span><br style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 18.200000762939453px;" /><br style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 18.200000762939453px;" /><span style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 18.200000762939453px;">4. The GOOD Shepherd. Good Father.&nbsp;</span><br style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 18.200000762939453px;" /><br style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 18.200000762939453px;" /><span style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 18.200000762939453px;">I'm a Dad. I don't want my children in rags playing in the dirt. I want them WELL taken care of. It's my heart as a parent. So by claiming that God wants you poor what you are saying about God's heart as a Father?&nbsp;</span><br style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 18.200000762939453px;" /><br style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 18.200000762939453px;" /><span style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 18.200000762939453px;">Please don't talk bad about my Father that way. My Daddy LOVES you! If He was willing to give the life of his OWN SON, how will He not also give us ALL things to richly enjoy. (Romans 8:32 and 1 Tim 6:17)</span><br style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 18.200000762939453px;" /><br style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 18.200000762939453px;" /><span style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 18.200000762939453px;">PS: Just to point this out 1 Tim 6:10 "Don't love money" is just before 1 Tim 6:17 "He gives us all things to richly enjoy!"</span><br style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 18.200000762939453px;" /><br style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 18.200000762939453px;" /><span style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 18.200000762939453px;">As Jeremy Pearsons said in his message "Who Cares", and I paraphrase, "It's like the parent to the kid in a store, when the child picks up something very expensive and fears he'll break it: 'Put that back where you found it!' "</span><br style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 18.200000762939453px;" /><span style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 18.200000762939453px;">http://www.pearsonsministries.com/resources.html&nbsp;</span><br style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 18.200000762939453px;" /><br style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 18.200000762939453px;" /><br style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 18.200000762939453px;" /><span style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 18.200000762939453px;">I can tell you that when people come on chat boxes spouting their emotional opinions about Wealth being evil have no real understanding of the bible.&nbsp;</span><br style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 18.200000762939453px;" /><br style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 18.200000762939453px;" /><span style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 18.200000762939453px;">A balanced biblical view includes wealth building.&nbsp;</span><br style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 18.200000762939453px;" /><br style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 18.200000762939453px;" /><span style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 18.200000762939453px;">If you want to know more about that I'll send you my eBook on Banking Basics for Believers for FREE. Email me at ME@DarrellWolfe.Com&nbsp;</span><br style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 18.200000762939453px;" /><br style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 18.200000762939453px;" /><span style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 18.200000762939453px;">Also see www.DaveRamsey.com and www.GatewayPeople.Com and my site www.DarrellWolfe.com</span>
